arabicText: وُلِدَ الْحَبِيبُ فِي مَكَّةَ الْمُكَرَّمَةِ عَامَ الْفِيلِ بَيْنَ الْأَنْوَارِ
latinTransliteration: Wulidal-ḥabību fī Makkatal-Mukarramati ‘āmal-fīli baynal-anwār
englishTranslation: The Beloved was born in Mecca the Honored, in the Year of the Elephant, amidst glorious lights.
wolofTranslationStandard: Yonent bi juddu na ca Makka mu barkeel ma, ci atum ñay ja, and ak leer yu rëy.
wolofalAjamiScript: يُونِࣺنْتْ بِ جُدُّ نَ سَ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ سِ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرْ يُ رِي

arabicText: وَأَضَاءَتْ لِوِلَادَتِهِ قُصُورُ الشَّامِ وَظَهَرَتْ مُعْجِزَاتٌ كَثِيرَةٌ لِلْمَلَأِ
latinTransliteration: Wa aḍā'at li-wilādatihi quṣūrush-Shāmi wa ẓaharat mu‘jizātun kathīratun lil-mala'
englishTranslation: And at his birth, the castles of Sham shone, and numerous miracles appeared to the people.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te leeram sotti na ba ca kër yu kawe ya ca Sham, te ab jéigo gu rëy leral na ko.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِيرَمْ سُتِّ نَ بَ سَ كِࣺرْ يُ كَوِ يَ سَ شَامْ تِ اَبْ جِيجُ جُ رِي لِرَلْ نَ كُ

arabicText: ثُمَّ هَاجَرَ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ الْمُنَوَّرَةِ فَأَسَّسَ دَوْلَةَ الْإِسْلَامِ وَالْإِيمَانِ
latinTransliteration: Thumma hājara ilal-Madīnati-l-Munawwarati fa-assasa dawlatal-islāmi wal-īmān
englishTranslation: Then he migrated to Medina the Illuminated, establishing the state of Islam and faith.
wolofTranslationStandard: Ci kaw lolu mu gàddaay ca Madina ngir taxawal kërëg lislaam ak ngëm.
wolofalAjamiScript: سِ كَوْ لُلُ مُ جَدَّايْ سَ مَدِينَة نْجِرْ تَخَوَلْ كِࣺرِجْ لِسْلَامْ اَكْ نْجِࣺمْ

arabicText: عَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ وَمَا سَارَ السَّالِكُ فِي طَرِيقِ الْحَقِّ
latinTransliteration: ‘Alayhi-ṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku wa mā sāras-sāliku fī ṭarīqil-ḥaqq
englishTranslation: May blessings and peace be upon him as long as the heavens revolve and the seeker walks the path of truth.
wolofTranslationStandard: Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca yoonu dëgg.
wolofalAjamiScript: جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ يُونُ دِࣺجّ

arabicText: وُلِدَ الْحَبِيبُ فِي مَكَّةَ الْمُكَرَّمَةِ عَامَ الْفِيلِ بَيْنَ الْأَنْوَارِ [5]
latinTransliteration: Wulidal-ḥabību fī Makkatal-Mukarramati ‘āmal-fīli baynal-anwār (5)
englishTranslation: The Beloved was born in Mecca the Honored, in the Year of the Elephant, amidst glorious lights. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yonent bi juddu na ca Makka mu barkeel ma, ci atum ñay ja, and ak leer yu rëy. (Wers 5)

latinTransliteration: Wa aḍā'at li-wilādatihi quṣūrush-Shāmi wa ẓaharat mu‘jizātun kathīratun lil-mala' (6)
englishTranslation: And at his birth, the castles of Sham shone, and numerous miracles appeared to the people. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te leeram sotti na ba ca kër yu kawe ya ca Sham, te ab jéigo gu rëy leral na ko. (Wers 6)

latinTransliteration: Thumma hājara ilal-Madīnati-l-Munawwarati fa-assasa dawlatal-islāmi wal-īmān (7)

englishTranslation: May blessings and peace be upon him as long as the heavens revolve and the seeker walks the path of truth. (Stanza 8)

latinTransliteration: Wulidal-ḥabību fī Makkatal-Mukarramati ‘āmal-fīli baynal-anwār (25)
englishTranslation: The Beloved was born in Mecca the Honored, in the Year of the Elephant, amidst glorious lights. (Stanza 25)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yonent bi juddu na ca Makka mu barkeel ma, ci atum ñay ja, and ak leer yu rëy. (Wers 25)
wolofalAjamiScript: يُونِࣺنْتْ بِ جُدُّ نَ سَ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ سِ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرْ يُ رِي [25]

arabicText: وَأَضَاءَتْ لِوِلَادَتِهِ قُصُورُ الشَّامِ وَظَهَرَتْ مُعْجِزَاتٌ كَثِيرَةٌ لِلْمَلَأِ [26]
latinTransliteration: Wa aḍā'at li-wilādatihi quṣūrush-Shāmi wa ẓaharat mu‘jizātun kathīratun lil-mala' (26)
englishTranslation: And at his birth, the castles of Sham shone, and numerous miracles appeared to the people. (Stanza 26)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te leeram sotti na ba ca kër yu kawe ya ca Sham, te ab jéigo gu rëy leral na ko. (Wers 26)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِيرَمْ سُتِّ نَ بَ سَ كِࣺرْ يُ كَوِ يَ سَ شَامْ تِ اَبْ جِيجُ جُ رِي لِرَلْ نَ كُ [26]

arabicText: ثُمَّ هَاجَرَ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ الْمُنَوَّرَةِ فَأَسَّسَ دَوْلَةَ الْإِسْلَامِ وَالْإِيمَانِ [27]
latinTransliteration: Thumma hājara ilal-Madīnati-l-Munawwarati fa-assasa dawlatal-islāmi wal-īmān (27)
englishTranslation: Then he migrated to Medina the Illuminated, establishing the state of Islam and faith. (Stanza 27)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ci kaw lolu mu gàddaay ca Madina ngir taxawal kërëg lislaam ak ngëm. (Wers 27)
wolofalAjamiScript: سِ كَوْ لُلُ مُ جَدَّايْ سَ مَدِينَة نْجِرْ تَخَوَلْ كِࣺرِجْ لِسْلَامْ اَكْ نْجِࣺمْ [27]

arabicText: عَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ وَمَا سَارَ السَّالِكُ فِي طَرِيقِ الْحَقِّ [28]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alayhi-ṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku wa mā sāras-sāliku fī ṭarīqil-ḥaqq (28)
englishTranslation: May blessings and peace be upon him as long as the heavens revolve and the seeker walks the path of truth. (Stanza 28)
wolofTranslationStandard: Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca yoonu dëgg. (Wers 28)
wolofalAjamiScript: جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ يُونُ دِࣺجّ [28]

arabicText: وُلِدَ الْحَبِيبُ فِي مَكَّةَ الْمُكَرَّمَةِ عَامَ الْفِيلِ بَيْنَ الْأَنْوَارِ [29]
latinTransliteration: Wulidal-ḥabību fī Makkatal-Mukarramati ‘āmal-fīli baynal-anwār (29)
englishTranslation: The Beloved was born in Mecca the Honored, in the Year of the Elephant, amidst glorious lights. (Stanza 29)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yonent bi juddu na ca Makka mu barkeel ma, ci atum ñay ja, and ak leer yu rëy. (Wers 29)
